hero.subtitle: Project, task, and personal life management, <1>directly where your conversations are.</1>

problem.title: We live in chat, but manage in <1>"grey software"</1>.
problem.desc: The disconnect between where we talk and where we work is the source of stress. Current tools ask for too many clicks, and sending a message to your team doesn't update the project status.
problem.card1_desc: How many times did a client ask for something via WhatsApp and you forgot to pass it to the manager? If the process is "lazy", the task is lost.
problem.card2_desc: Complex interfaces and inefficient navigation that force you to perform mechanical tasks over and over again.
problem.card3_desc: Critical information, important documents and agreements disappear quickly in the chat history.
problem.visual_desc: Too many clicks to create a task...

solution.title: The hybrid solution.
solution.subtitle: The best of a Project Manager with the simplicity of a Chat. TuDu is the intelligence layer that connects your daily messaging with your long-term goals.
solution.feat1_desc: Turn conversations into immediate actions. TuDu detects the intention and automatically creates the task removing bureaucratic clicks.
solution.feat2_desc: Your clients don't need to download anything. You keep the order in Kanban boards, they keep the convenience of their favorite App.
solution.feat3_desc: You don't just save tasks, we help you complete them. Daily priority analysis, document drafting, and proactive assistance.
solution.feat4_desc: Manage your personal projects with the same power as your work ones, keeping strict privacy. Switch from 'organizing my house' to 'managing the company' in a second, under the same central identity.

cta_final.title:
While others add buttons,
we eliminate steps.
cta_final.desc:
We connect people, automate processes, generate results.
The ROI of conversational management is here.

pricing.title: Invest in your peace of mind
pricing.subtitle: Simple and transparent plans for teams of any size.
